metadata.title: Consistent Attachments and Links
metadata.description: This plugin ensures the consistency of attachments and links

regex.source: Notice("An unhandled error occurred. Please check the console for more information.")
regex.target: Notice("发生未处理的错误。请检查控制台以获取更多信息。")

regex.source: Notice(`Attachment ${file.path} is still used by other notes. It will not be deleted.`)
regex.target: Notice(`附件${file.path}仍然被其他笔记使用。它不会被删除。`)

regex.source: Notice("No files found that need to be moved")
regex.target: Notice("未找到需要被移动的文件")

regex.source: Notice("No embeds found that need to be converted")
regex.target: Notice("未找到需要转换的嵌入内容")

regex.source: Notice("No links found that need to be converted")
regex.target: Notice("没有找到需要转换的链接")

regex.source: Notice("No wiki embeds found that need to be replaced")
regex.target: Notice("没有发现需要替换的维基嵌入内容")

regex.source: Notice("No wiki links found that need to be replaced")
regex.target: Notice("找不到需要替换的 wiki 链接")

regex.source: .log(this.consoleLogPrefix + "copy file with new name [from, to]: \n   " + path + "\n   " + newFileCopyName)
regex.target: .log(this.consoleLogPrefix + "复制文件并重命名 [from, to]: \n   " + path + "\n   " + newFileCopyName)
.setName("根据笔记删除未使用的附件")
.setName("删除移动笔记时的重复附件")
.setName("在笔记重命名时更新反向链接")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically move attachments when a note is relocated. This includes attachments located in the same folder or any of its subfolders.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当笔记移动时自动移动附件。这包括位于同一文件夹或其子文件夹中的附件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically remove attachments that are no longer referenced in other notes when the note is deleted.")
regex.target: .setDesc("删除笔记时，自动删除无其他笔记引用的附件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically update links to attachments and other notes when moving notes or attachments.")
regex.target: .setDesc("移动笔记或附件时，自动更新附件和其他笔记的附件链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically remove empty folders after moving notes with attachments.")
regex.target: .setDesc("移动带附件的笔记后，自动删除空文件夹。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically delete attachments when moving a note if a file with the same name exists in the destination folder. If disabled, the file will be renamed and moved.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果目标文件夹中存在同名文件，则在移动备忘时自动删除附件。如果禁用，文件将重命名并移动。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify a list of folders to ignore. Enter each folder on a new line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定要忽略的文件夹列表。在新行中输入每个文件夹。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify a list of files to ignore. Enter each file on a new line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定要忽略的文件列表。在新行中输入每个文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the name of the file for the consistency report.")
.setDesc("Automatically collect attachments when the note is edited.")
.appendText(" removed. This is a BREAKING CHANGE.")
regex.target: .appendText("已删除。这是一个 重大 的改动。")

regex.source: .setDesc("When a note is renamed, its linked references are automatically updated. If this option is enabled, the text of backlinks to this note will also be modified.")
regex.target: .setDesc("笔记重命名时，其链接引用会自动更新。如果启用此选项，该笔记的反向链接文本也会被修改。")
name: "收集当前笔记中的附件"

regex.source: name:"Convert All Link Paths to Relative"
regex.target: name: "将所有链接路径转换为相对路径"

regex.source: name:"Convert All Link Paths to Relative in Current Note"
regex.target: name: "将当前笔记中所有链接路径转换为相对路径"

regex.source: name:"Convert All Embed Paths to Relative"
regex.target: name: "将所有嵌入路径转换为相对路径"

regex.source: name:"Convert All Embed Paths to Relative in Current Note"
regex.target: name: "将当前笔记中的所有嵌入路径转换为相对路径"

regex.source: name:"Replace All Wiki Links with Markdown Links"
regex.target: name: "用 Markdown 链接替换所有 Wiki 链接"

regex.source: name:"Replace All Wiki Links with Markdown Links in Current Note"
regex.target: name: "将当前笔记中的所有 Wiki 链接替换为 Markdown 链接"

regex.source: name:"Replace All Wiki Embeds with Markdown Embeds"
regex.target: name: "将所有 Wiki 嵌入替换为 Markdown 嵌入"

regex.source: name:"Replace All Wiki Embeds with Markdown Embeds in Current Note"
regex.target: name: "在当前笔记中用 Markdown 嵌入替换所有 Wiki 嵌入"

regex.source: Delete Duplicate Attachments on Note Move
regex.target: 删除笔记移动时的重复附件

regex.source: Include notes from the following paths
Insert each path on a new line
You can use path string or
regex.target: 你可以使用路径字符串，或使用

regex.source: If the setting is empty, all notes are included
regex.target: 如果设置为空，则包含所有笔记

regex.source: Exclude notes from the following paths
If the setting is empty, no notes are excluded
regex.target: 如果设置为空，则不会排除任何笔记

regex.source: Using 'Consistent Attachments and Links' plugin without proper configuration might lead to inconvenient attachment rearrangements or even data loss in your vault.
regex.target: 如果“Consistent Attachments and Links”插件没有正确配置，可能会导致你的保险库中的附件被错误的移动，甚至造成数据丢失。
收集当前文件夹中的附件
